steps.title: Set up the substitution
steps.content: We need to find the sum of interior angles for a polygon with 41 sides. Substitute $x = 41$ into the given function.

steps.title: Calculate f(41)
steps.content:
$$f(41) = 180(41 - 2)$$
$$f(41) = 180(39)$$
$$f(41) = 7020$$
The sum of the interior angles for a 41-sided polygon is 7020 degrees.
